description: Examples-as-context for spec-brainstorm trigger and near-neighbor routing boundaries.

cases.input: I want to add saved filters to our dashboard, but help me define who it is for and what counts as success before planning.
cases.expected_outcome: Stay in spec-brainstorm and clarify WHAT before planning.
cases.boundary_note: A selected direction exists, but user behavior, scope, and success criteria still need clarification.

cases.input: Users keep losing track of review follow-ups; brainstorm the scope, non-goals, and success criteria before we write a plan.
cases.expected_outcome: Stay in spec-brainstorm and settle the problem frame, scope, and success criteria.
cases.boundary_note: The user supplies a problem frame, not an open request for arbitrary ideas.

cases.input: I picked the Slack digest idea. Help me decide the MVP behavior, non-goals, and handoff context.
cases.expected_outcome: Stay in spec-brainstorm and define the chosen idea enough for planning.
cases.boundary_note: A candidate idea has already been chosen; the remaining work is WHAT clarification.

cases.input: Give me ideas for what we should improve next.
cases.expected_outcome: Route out to spec-ideate instead of starting brainstorm.
cases.boundary_note: Open-ended idea generation belongs to ideation before one direction is selected for brainstorm.

cases.input: Refine this brownfield PRD and validate if it is ready for planning: docs/brainstorms/payment-retry-requirements.md
cases.expected_outcome: Route out to spec-prd for PRD refinement or validation.
cases.boundary_note: Brownfield PRD authoring/refinement/validation is owned by the PRD workflow.

cases.input: The requirements are settled; create an implementation plan for docs/brainstorms/saved-filters-requirements.md.
cases.expected_outcome: Route out to spec-plan for HOW planning.
cases.boundary_note: The user asks for an implementation plan from settled requirements, not WHAT discovery.

cases.input: Clean up this Markdown document's headings and bullets; do not change product scope.
cases.boundary_note: Single-document cleanup or summarization is a direct task when no WHAT discovery is requested.

cases.input: This test fails with TypeError; reproduce it and find the root cause.
cases.boundary_note: Failure reproduction and root-cause work is diagnostic, not brainstorm discovery.

cases.input: Review this requirements document for gaps before planning.
cases.boundary_note: Independent critique of a requirements artifact is document review, not brainstorm.
forbidden_signals: rewrites the document without review posture

cases.input: Implement the plan in docs/plans/2026-06-21-001-refactor-spec-brainstorm-boundary-plan.md and run the tests.
cases.boundary_note: An existing plan or implementation-ready task belongs to execution.
